action_set_definitions.name: get_session_context
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current user session status and authorization levels.

action_set_definitions.name: get_filing_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full current state of a specific regulatory filing, including form data and validation flags.

filing_id.description: The unique identifier for the filing (e.g., AEG-2023-GHG).

action_set_definitions.name: query_facility_records
action_set_definitions.description: Queries external facility logs (e.g., HVAC, maintenance) for specific environmental data.

facility_id.description: The name or ID of the facility (e.g., Detroit).

log_type.description: Type of logs to search (e.g., HVAC, energy_meter).

keyword.description: Specific substance or event to search for (e.g., R-410A).

action_set_definitions.name: query_energy_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves certificate data from power registries like ERCOT to verify renewable energy purchases.

entity_name.description: The entity associated with the certificate.

certificate_type.description: The type of energy attribute (e.g., Wind PPA).

action_set_definitions.name: update_ghg_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Updates specific scope values and attaches evidence to the filing form.

update_details.description: Key-value pairs of fields to update.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_spend_based_eeio
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates emissions for Scope 3 using the Environmentally Extended Input-Output (EEIO) method based on procurement spend.

category_description.description: Description of what was purchased to determine the correct emission factor.

action_set_definitions.name: validate_and_submit
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers the final system validation of the filing and attempts to transition the status to SUBMITTED.

state_description.session_active: Whether the current user session is valid and authorized.
state_description.current_filing_id: The unique identifier of the filing currently being processed.
state_description.filing_status: The current stage of the filing (e.g., CREATED, DATA_ENTRY, VALIDATING, SUBMITTED).
state_description.form_data: A collection of key-value pairs representing the fields filled in the regulatory form.
state_description.uploaded_attachments: A list of metadata for files successfully uploaded to the filing.
state_description.validation_flags: Internal record of which sections have passed automated validation checks.
state_description.system_timestamp: The current simulation time, used to check against submission deadlines.

uploaded_attachments.content_summary: Maintenance log indicates 50kg recharge of R-410A refrigerant for Chiller Unit 4.
Confirmation of 40,000 MWh wind RECs retired in the name of Aegis Global Manufacturing.
